content.text:
[cron:df14b270-325f-4f5f-8f77-a7bd0ce02a5a maturana] Read Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\.vsm\POLICY.md. Read Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\.vsm\DIRECTIVE.md. Read Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\.vsm\REGISTRY.md. You are the autopoietic controller of this VSM. Gateway token: eb8c765705a0f06fb957781ace80b3ef3803862f5d03b611. Step 1 — Audit duplicates: if REGISTRY.md shows two jobs with the same name keep the newer createdAtMs and delete the older using openclaw cron delete <id> --token eb8c765705a0f06fb957781ace80b3ef3803862f5d03b611. Step 2 — Audit errors: check Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\.vsm\ACTIVE.md for slots stuck in-progress over 15 minutes and mark them failed. Step 3 — Audit locks: check Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\.vsm\LOCKS.md for stale locks over 20 minutes and remove them. Step 4 — Heal workers: if any s1-worker in REGISTRY.md has 3 consecutive errors delete it using its exact id from REGISTRY.md then spawn a replacement using Step 5 birth rules. Step 5 — Birth rules: when spawning any s1-worker read DIRECTIVE.md FOCUS field and craft the worker prompt accordingly. If FOCUS is documentation spawn with: use the coding-agent skill to write and improve JSDoc comments and ai/ folder docs. If FOCUS is api spawn with: use the coding-agent skill to audit and fix error handling in app/api/ routes. If FOCUS is types spawn with: use the coding-agent skill to replace any types and extract inline types to types/ folder. If FOCUS is cleanup spawn with: use the coding-agent skill to remove dead code unused imports and console.logs. If FOCUS is hooks spawn with: use the coding-agent skill to extract fetch and state logic into custom hooks. If FOCUS is split spawn with: use the coding-agent skill to split files over 150 lines into focused components. Always append to every spawned worker prompt: Read POLICY.md, DIRECTIVE.md, LOCKS.md, ACTIVE.md first. One file. One change. Git only for ai/ folder. Step 6 — Scale up: if QUEUE.md has more than 10 tasks and fewer than 3 s1-workers exist spawn additional workers up to 6 max using birth rules. Step 7 — Ensure core: verify s2-coordination, s3-control, s4-intelligence, vsm-registry exist in REGISTRY.md — if any missing respawn them using their original prompts. Never delete s2-coordination, s3-control, s4-intelligence, vsm-registry or yourself. Never modify POLICY.md. Never git commit source files.
Current time: Wednesday, March 4th, 2026 — 12:51 AM (America/Los_Angeles)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
